shellCommands.command: pwd && git status --short && rg -n "updateFieldArrayRootError|FieldArray.*Error|root.*error|errors\[name\]|set\(.*errors" src | head -200
find src -type f -maxdepth 5 | sort | head -100; grep -RInE "updateFieldArrayRootError|FieldArray.*Error|root.*error|errors\[name\]|set\(.*errors" src | head -240

sed -n '1,200p' src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts; sed -n '240,370p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '500,715p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '330,420p' src/useFieldArray.ts; sed -n '1000,1085p' src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx

sed -n '1085,1145p' src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx; cat src/utils/convertToArrayPayload.ts; grep -RIn "function isObject\|const isObject\|export default.*isObject\|isPlainObject" src/utils src | head -60; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/isObject.ts; sed -n '1,120p' src/utils/set.ts; sed -n '1,120p' src/utils/get.ts; grep -RIn "convertToArrayPayload" src | head -80

git log --oneline -12 -- src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts src/logic/createFormControl.ts; git blame -L 1,40 src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts; sed -n '1,180p' src/types/errors.ts; grep -n "type FieldErrors\|FieldError" src/types/errors.ts src/types/*.ts | head -100; grep -n "should preserve resolver nested\|field-array" src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx src/__tests__/useFieldArray/*.test.tsx | head -100

sed -n '1,230p' src/useFieldArray.ts; sed -n '230,430p' src/useFieldArray.ts; grep -n "export type Control\|_setFieldArray\|_names.array" src/types/form.ts src/logic/createFormControl.ts | head -100; sed -n '1090,1170p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; cat package.json; test -f AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,200p' AGENTS.md

git branch -a --no-color | head -40; git log --all --oneline -S"convertToArrayPayload(get(errors, name))" -- src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts; git remote -v; grep -RIn "\.root.*message\|errors.*\[0\].*root\|items?.\[0\]" src/__tests__/useFieldArray* src/__tests__/useForm | head -120
cat src/utils/isPlainObject.ts; sed -n '3460,3570p' src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx; sed -n '4740,4830p' src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx; sed -n '1,100p' scripts/jest/jest.config.js
